hero.title: Find a Bed. Support the Community.
hero.subtitle: aBed4.me is a locally controlled booking platform. Only 10% commission — and the money stays here, not in the pockets of international corporations.

why.title: The Problem
why.statLabel: leaves Koh Phangan yearly to Airbnb alone
why.point1: AirBnB, Booking.com, Hostelworld, Agoda — they all take 15–25%. Local hosts receive less income, while the platform profits.
why.point2: Locals have little say in how the platform operates or prioritizes listings. The rules are made far away.
why.point3: Revenue goes to foreign corporations. Very little stays in the community to support local infrastructure, education, or development.

how.title: The Solution
how.point1: 5% for platform development & growth. 2% for the local foundation. 2% for agents. 1% for guest referrals.
how.point2: We build our own native booking platform, controlled by the community — not by distant corporations.
how.point3: Island cleanups, water conservation, reforestation, animal welfare, education & youth programs — funded by every booking.

cta.title: Imagine Every Booking Supporting Your Community
cta.subtitle: Creating more value for us — not big international corporations. Be part of this change.

benefits.title: Benefits for Hosts
benefits.higherDesc: Keep more of what you earn with only 10% commission
benefits.supportDesc: Help in your language, from people who know your area
benefits.fairDesc: Rules made by the community, for the community
benefits.referralDesc: Earn by inviting other hosts and guests

survey.title: Quick Survey
survey.subtitle: Help us understand your needs. Takes less than 1 minute.
survey.q1: How satisfied are you with current booking platforms?
survey.q2: What commission % do you currently pay?
survey.q3Placeholder: Tell us what bothers you most...
survey.q4: How interested are you in a locally-owned alternative? (1–10)
survey.q5: Would you join if it meant higher profits?
survey.thanksText: Your feedback is invaluable. Ready to list your property?

hotel.title: List Your Property
hotel.subtitle: Tell us about your accommodation. It only takes a minute.
hotel.name: Property Name
hotel.successText: Your property is now in our database. We'll review it shortly.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: A booking platform that gives back to the community.
vision.section1: International booking platforms extract millions from local communities. On Koh Phangan alone, Airbnb takes over $4 million per year in fees. That money leaves the island — no reinvestment in infrastructure, education, or the environment.
vision.section2: We build our own locally controlled booking platform. Only 10% commission — transparently distributed to grow the platform, support the community, and reward those who help spread the word.
vision.step3: Invite fellow hosts with your referral link
vision.step5: Earn from bookings — and every booking supports the community

footer.tagline: The booking platform that gives back to the community.
